claim_text: AssistPro supports natural language queries and is capable of understanding user intent across a wide range of IT and HR topics. The system maintains conversational context and supports multi-turn interactions.
The platform supports ingestion of internal documentation, including PDF and Markdown files. Documents are processed and indexed to enable fast and relevant retrieval during query handling.
AssistPro can be accessed through web interfaces and integrates with communication platforms such as Slack for seamless employee interaction.
Administrators can manage knowledge sources, monitor system usage, and configure system behavior through a centralized dashboard.
AssistPro supports Single Sign-On (SSO) integration using industry-standard protocols such as SAML 2.0. Integration with identity providers like Okta is supported in enterprise deployments.
Role-based access control (RBAC) allows organizations to define permissions for different user roles including employees, administrators, and auditors.
AssistPro ensures encryption of data both at rest and in transit. The platform follows standard security practices to safeguard sensitive information.
The system maintains logs of user interactions and administrative actions. These logs can be accessed through the admin interface for monitoring and auditing purposes.
Advanced audit logging capabilities, including export and integration with external monitoring tools, are available in enterprise plans.
AssistPro aligns with industry compliance frameworks such as GDPR and SOC 2. Data handling practices are designed to meet regulatory requirements for enterprise customers.
AssistPro retains customer data based on configurable retention policies. Default retention settings may vary depending on the deployment plan.
Data deletion requests can be processed through administrative workflows. Timelines for deletion may depend on system configuration and service agreements.
The platform supports export of knowledge base content and system logs for compliance and auditing purposes.

AssistPro is designed to handle concurrent requests across multiple users without significant performance degradation. The system uses scalable infrastructure to ensure availability and responsiveness.
Typical response times for standard queries are within acceptable enterprise thresholds.
AssistPro offers multiple pricing tiers:
Standard Plan: Includes basic query handling, document ingestion, and limited integrations.
Professional Plan: Adds advanced analytics and expanded integration capabilities.

Enterprise Plan: Includes SSO, advanced audit logs, enhanced security controls, and priority support. Pricing varies based on the number of users and selected features. Enterprise features are not included in lower-tier plans.
AssistPro provides APIs for integration with external systems. It supports integration with communication platforms like Slack and can be extended to other enterprise tools.

Certain advanced features such as SSO integration, enhanced audit logging, and extended security controls are only available in enterprise deployments. Data retention and deletion timelines may vary based on configuration and contractual agreements.
AssistPro can be deployed within 6-10 weeks depending on integration complexity and customization requirements. Vendor support is provided during onboarding.
